displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Cleanses hair and scalp for revitalized beautiful hair
• Makes hair feels soft and fresh, light and easy to manage
• Powered with HydraZinc technology to keep hair completely dandruff free

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Directions:
1. Shake before use
2. Wet hair and gently massage onto scalp
3. Lather and rinse thoroughly
4. Repeat if desired
• Caution:
Avoid contact with eyes and if this happens, rinse thoroughly with water

metaData.Key Information:
• Specially formulated with nutrium 10 which is a blend of nutrients, vitamins and minerals
• Nourishes scalp deeply to restore essential nutrients and gives longer-lasting dandruff protection
• Revives scalp and hair with a refreshing sensation
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Apply to wet hair and scalp
2. Rinse thoroughly and repeat if desired
• Note:
For best results, use everyday
• Warning:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. If eye contact occurs, rinse immediately

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua)･Sodium Laureth Sulfate･Cocamidopropyl Betaine･Menthol･Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride･Hydroxyethyl Urea･Peg-60 Hydrogenated Castor Oil･Lactic Acid･Camellia Japonica Seed Oil･Sodium Dilauramidoglutamide Lysine･Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine･Phytosteryl/Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate･Phytosteryl Macadamiate･Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Leaf Extract･Squalane･Dipropylene Glycol･Peg-2 Laurate･Sodium Sulfate･Sodium Methyltaurate･Citric Acid･Salicylic Acid･Disodium Edta･Ammonium Lactate･Ppg-70 Glyceryl Ether･Butylene Glycol･Ethylhexyl Palmitate･Bht･Tocopherol･Phenoxyethanol･Sodium Benzoate･Fragrance (Parfum)･  <M122502-710>
metaData.Key Information:
Smooth Hair with Less Sweat & Sebum
And Achieve Salon-Quality Hair at Home with Zero Waiting Time!

1) Double Repair
Repair damage on both surface and deep layers of hair with Camellia Oil and Damage Sensor Function

2) Cool Repair Formula
Cleans out sweat, sebum, and other dirt to reduce sebum, and leave scalp healthy and conditioned

3) Camellia Oil Force
Powered by Tsubaki’s signature ingredient to deeply moisturise, repair damage, reduce frizz and breakage, and hydrate the scalp for healthier hair and scalp.

Non-silicone formula which helps reduce build up and weighing down of hair. Get supple, bouncy, living shine with Tsubaki Premium Cool & Repair Shampoo. The pleasantly cool sensation refreshes the scalp while repairing hair from the inside out, leaving hair silky and smooth with a beautiful shine every time you move.

Suitable for
Flat & Oily Hair
Individuals living in hot and humid environments

product.name: Tsubaki Premium Cool & Repair Shampoo

offers.description: Buy 1 Tsubaki Premium Cool & Repair Shampoo @ $16.90
